channel.title: #Bcstransform on adoption curve dot net
channel.description: Recent content in #Bcstransform on adoption curve dot net

item.title: The People's Front Of @BCS
item.description: There’s a bit of a flap going on right now at the BCS, which you may have noticed if you were wondering why the #bcstransform hashtag was all over Twitter earlier today. It’s all a bit People’s Front Of Judea, but a partial truncated backstory is that the BCS leadership have been implementing changes to the institution which has resulted in rebranding as the “Chartered Institute of IT”. The direction of focus seems to be away from the membership groups and towards more commercial activity, and some members are up in arms about this.
